mapper.select: SELECT at.plc_id AS plcId, ah_s.history_id AS startId, ah_s.occur_time AS startTime, ( SELECT MIN(ah_e.occur_time) FROM tb_alarm_history ah_e JOIN tb_alarm_tag at_e ON at_e.tag_id = ah_e.tag_id WHERE at_e.plc_id = at.plc_id AND at_e.alarm_msg = 'Fool Proof 종료' AND ah_e.occur_time >= ah_s.occur_time ) AS endTime, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_alarm_history ah_c JOIN tb_fproof_alarm fa ON fa.tag_id = ah_c.tag_id AND fa.plc_id = at.plc_id WHERE ah_c.occur_time >= ah_s.occur_time AND ah_c.occur_time <= COALESCE( ( SELECT MIN(ah_e2.occur_time) FROM tb_alarm_history ah_e2 JOIN tb_alarm_tag at_e2 ON at_e2.tag_id = ah_e2.tag_id WHERE at_e2.plc_id = at.plc_id AND at_e2.alarm_msg = 'Fool Proof 종료' AND ah_e2.occur_time >= ah_s.occur_time ), NOW() ) ) AS alarmCount FROM tb_alarm_history ah_s JOIN tb_alarm_tag at ON at.tag_id = ah_s.tag_id WHERE at.alarm_msg = 'Fool Proof 시작' AND ah_s.occur_time >= #{from} AND ah_s.occur_time < DATE_ADD(#{to}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY ah_s.occur_time DESC

SELECT ah.history_id AS historyId, at.tag_name AS tagName, at.alarm_msg AS alarmMsg, ah.occur_time AS occurTime, ah.clear_time AS clearTime, ah.ack_time AS ackTime, ah.ack_user AS ackUser FROM tb_alarm_history ah JOIN tb_alarm_tag at ON at.tag_id = ah.tag_id JOIN tb_fproof_alarm fa ON fa.tag_id = ah.tag_id AND fa.plc_id = at.plc_id WHERE at.plc_id = #{plcId} AND ah.occur_time >= #{start} AND ah.occur_time <= #{end} ORDER BY ah.occur_time ASC
